title: Campfire-StationAPI
description: add campfire similiar to 1.14 to b1.7.3
body:
This mod add Campfire, it act pretty similiar to how it was in 1.14

The crafting recipe is the same as modern version

This mod is partially based on the [Campfire Backport for 1.7.10](https://modrinth.com/mod/campfire-backport)

# Requirement
- [Babric](https://babric.github.io/)
- [StationAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/stationapi)
- [FarnUtil (Optional, Use for Campfire's smoke and Item render on campfire)](https://modrinth.com/mod/farnutil)

# Custom Campfire's Cooking Recipe Json file

You can created your own recipe by adding it to data/<modid>/campfire_recipe inside the mod jar

```
{
  "input": {    
    "item":"minecraft:cod",
  },
  "output": {
    "item":"minecraft:cooked_cod",
    "meta":0
  }
}
```

## item

StationAPI's item string id

You can find namespace of the item using [retrocommand](https://modrinth.com/mod/retrocommands) and looking at command guessing for /give

## meta (optional)

metadata for the item

if the input item meta is below 0 or not specified meaning it accept all metadata
